strategy_narrative:
Portfolio Overview: Analysis of 2 properties identified 1 high-risk and 1 medium-risk assets. The dominant hazard across the portfolio is seismic, affecting 1 properties.

Recommended Actions: 8 retrofit measures have been identified. 2 are quick wins with payback under 4 years, while 2 require significant capital investment for long-term resilience.

Financial Opportunity: Combined annual savings of $9,306,000 are achievable, with $154,117,000 in available tax credits, rebates, and grant funding to offset retrofit costs.

Regulatory Compliance: Title 24 (California Building Standards) apply to properties in this portfolio. Proactive compliance through the recommended measures will avoid penalties and position assets for green premium valuation.

regulations.name: Title 24 (California Building Code)
regulations.requirement: All-electric new construction mandate. Existing buildings must meet energy efficiency standards during major renovations.
regulations.pathway: Heat pump HVAC, induction cooking, solar PV + battery storage
